description: Run by the hosted Mend Renovate App (github.com/apps/renovate). No self-hosted workflow — see issue #877 for the migration rationale.

packageRules.description: pnpm.overrides are security pins, not feature upgrades. They force a transitive dep to the latest *patch within its current major* (the CVE fix). A major bump jumps the override target past the major its consumers (Docusaurus, webpack-dev-server, babel-7 plugins) are written against, leaving peers unsatisfied and breaking the docs build. Closed #1102/#1103/#1104 for exactly this. Patch/minor on overrides is still fine.
